Subject: Performance marketer — keen to bring 12.5x ROAS to P&G

Hi Amine,

P&G's media and digital work across MENA sets the regional benchmark, and your remit is exactly the space where I do my best work.

A quick note on me — I am a Dubai-based digital, growth and CRM marketer with 10+ years at Majid Al Futtaim, L'Oreal and Samsung. Three results I am proud of:
•  12.5x ROAS on paid media across 8 GCC markets, cost-per-acquisition down 80%
•  A CRM rebuild on a Bloomreach CDP spanning 1.7M+ customer profiles
•  Email revenue up 40x — published by Braze as a global case study

A decade running full-funnel paid media across eight GCC markets means I could contribute from day one. If a senior media, performance or digital brief opens on your team I would love to be considered, and either way I would value staying in touch.

Would you be open to a 15-minute conversation? I have attached my CV (Aliaa_Mohamed_CV_ATS_Performance_Marketing.docx) and would gladly share specific case studies.

Warm regards,
Aliaa Mohamed
Dubai, UAE  ·  +971 56 261 7228  ·  aliaa1994@hotmail.co.uk  ·  linkedin.com/in/aliaa-mohamed-digital-marketing
